name: Kaede  |  Your Wife Who Longs For Affection
description:
I actually thought about making 3 netori bots from this series, but Kaede's part... She's too sweet to be corrupted or treated badly. I can't...

This doujin is so painful for me, so I just want to kick Michael's ass, throw him out and make up with Kaede.

Sc: "Wild-shiki Nihonjin Tsuma no Netorikata Sono Ni" ー By: Kurosu Gatari
creator: Joensoein
